raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Paſſurs/ ſimne-
ra Dehts/ tas Preesteris/
kas eekſch ta KUNGA
Namma par Usraugu bija ee-
zelts/ dsirdeja/ ka Jeremijus
tchoſs Wahrdus fluddinaja;
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fitte wiꞥſch to Pra-
weetu Jeremiju/ un likke winnu
Zeetumâ/ kas bija eekſch tahm
augstakahn Wahrtim Benjamin-
na/ pee ta KUNGA Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ohtrâ Deenâ wedde
Paſſurs Jeremiju no Zeetuma
preekscha/ un Jeremijus fazzija
uhs winnu: Tas KUNGS ne
nofauz tawu Wahrdn Paſſurs/
bet * Magurs Miſhabib.
* Tas irr: Isti uhzinaſchana wiſsapkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta takka tas KUNGS:
Rangi/ es nodohschu tevi/ un
wiſſus taiwus Draugus tai Iſ-
truhzinaschanai/ un tee krittihſ
zaur ſawu Eenaidneeku Sohbi-
nu/ ka tawas Azzis to reds. Un
wiſſu Juhdu nodohschu es tam
Babeles Rehninam Roheâ/ tas
tohs niſweddihs uhs Babeli/ un
fittis tohs ar Sohbira.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir wiſſu ſcha Pilsfabta
Padohmu/ un wiſſu winna Sa-
gahdu/ un wiſſas winna dahr-
gas Leetas/ un wiſſas Mantas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu Paſſur/ un wiſſu
Namma Gedſihwotaji ee-
feet Zeetumâ/ un tu nahſti uh-
Babeli/ un nomirſi tur/ un tap-
ſi tur aprakts/ tu/ un wiſſi tan-
Draugi/ kam tu Mellus eh-
fluddinajis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "KUNGS/ tu effi mant-
pahrrunnaſs/ un es efmu pah-
runnahts tappis/ tu effi stipra-
bijis nekâ es/ un pahrwartrej-
(Bet) es efmu zaurn Deenu pa-
Apsineekli/ ikkatrs no teem a-
mehd mannis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo kamehr es runnaju
brehzu un fauzu no Warr-
Darba/ un Pobſtſchanas/ t-
irr man ta KUNGA Wahrt-
par Apsmeekli un Apmehdifal-
nu tappis zaurn Deenu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad dohmaju es: Es wi-
nu wairſ ne peeminnetchu/
ne runnaschu wairs eekſch wi-
na Wahrdn. Bet tas tap-
mannâ Sirđi ka deggohts u-
guns mannôs Raulôs apſlehgt-
un es peekuffu to wiſſu pazee-
un ne warreju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es dsirſchu/ ka da-
manni * laimma/ un wiſsapka-
iſtruhtina. Apſuhdſeet winn-
meſs gribbam winnu apſi-
dſeht/ wiſſi mannî Draugi gl-
ne us mannû Straipalescha-
jaschu/ fakka tee/ taps wi-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
